titleStmt.title: SII 23.576: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 576. (A.R. No. 576 of 1907.) Nandalūr, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga III year 33: 1209—10 A.D.

summary.p: The king is given the appellation “who took Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya”. The details of date are given as Prajāpati year, Vaigāśi month. This states that one Tirunāḍuḍaiyāṉ Ponnaṉ alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Kāḍuveṭṭi of Veṇkaṟchēṟṟuppēḍu in Veṇkala-nāḍu a division of Puḻarkōṭṭam alias Vikramaśōḻavaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam presented to the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ the karmārchchanai images of god Aḻagapperuṁāḷ and his two consorts together with an aureola and with the additional copper that remained he made other articles of worship like tīrtta-maṇḍai, śrībalittālam, tirumaṇḍai, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . (kule) tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅko
ṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 3Āvatu prajā- pati sam
vatsarattu vaikācimāsattu Atirājentiramaṇṭalattu meṟppākkai nā
ṭṭu nirantaṉūrāṉa Akara brahma tecam kulottuṅkacoḻac catuṟpetimaṅ
kalattuc cokkapperumāḷ koyilāṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa viṇṇakarkku
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu veṇ
kala nāṭṭu veṇkaṟceṟṟuppeṭaṉ tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉaṉāṉa kulottuṅ
kacoḻak kāṭuveṭṭi Iṉṉāḷil Ikkoyilukku karmāṟcanai Emperu māṉāṉa
Aḻakap perumāḷaiyum pirāṭṭimāraiyun tiruprabhaiyuṅkūṭa Eḻuntaruḷivittu Uyya
k koṇṭaruḷiṉaviṭattukku tiruprabhaiyuñceyvittu Iv Emperu māṉukku
ceṣamākak kuṭuttaṉa cempāl tirttamaṇṭai Oṉṟum śrīpalittāla mo
ṉṟum tirumaṇṭai yoṉṟum caṅkoṉṟum kāloṉṟum caṭṭuvamo
ṉṟun tārai Iraṇṭum(ṉ) tanikkāḷa moṉṟum ciṉṉamiraṇṭum paṇṇa Iṭṭār .
Digital edition of SII 23.576 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
